title: Tjfarmer
compiled_truth: Tjfarmer is an external contact at [Juno](companies/juno). Over the corpus period (2000-02-04 to 2001-12-08), Tjfarmer sent 7 and received 55 emails, totalling 62 interactions. Top correspondents: [Dfarmer](people/dfarmer) (4), [Daren Farmer](people/daren-farmer) (3).
